_comment: Kerne Protocol public address registry for Base mainnet (chain 8453). Curated public mirror: contains only on-chain-public facts (contract names, addresses, types, explorer links, verification status). Operational and internal records are kept in Kerne's working repository and are out of scope here.

admin.role: Holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on the protocol contracts

KUSDPSM.type: Peg Stability Module v3 (USDC -> kUSD mint; holds kUSD MINTER_ROLE)
KUSDPSM.note: Live mint PSM deployed in the 2026-06-16 ceremony. The prior PSM 0xFf3025ec...5Fbc had MINTER_ROLE revoked and is retained only as the kUSD->USDC redeem reserve (see retired.KUSDPSM_v1_redeemReserve).

KerneVault.type: Collateral vault v2 (ERC-4626; holds kUSD MINTER_ROLE)
KerneVault.note: Live deposit/mint vault deployed in the 2026-06-16 ceremony. Supersedes v1 0x8005bc7A...F2AC (retired; MINTER_ROLE revoked), which the Proof of Reserves still attests until reserves migrate. Public WETH deposits intentionally closed pre-launch.

KERNE.type: Governance token (canonical v2, 1,000,000,000 fixed supply, no mint function)

retired._comment: Superseded deployments, kept for historical reconciliation. Do not use for minting.
retired._redeemReserveNote: KUSDPSM_v1 had MINTER_ROLE revoked in the 2026-06-16 ceremony; it no longer mints but is retained as the kUSD->USDC redeem reserve backing residual kUSD. KerneVault_v1 is the retired vault the Proof of Reserves currently attests.

notes: Live state (TVL, kUSD supply, role grants, peg) is authoritative on-chain. Verify any value with the cast calls in HOW_TO_VERIFY_KERNE.md or run scripts/verify_public_endpoints.sh. Source-vs-deployed drift for contracts with in-development fixes is disclosed in the gaps array of https://kerne.fi/api/risk-status.
